title: Responsible trade communication built on verified information.
intro: Hayked can share approved information about sourcing relationships, operational responsibility and business practices as part of buyer discussions.

principles.title: Transparent communication
principles.text: Share coffee, service and sourcing information carefully and avoid unsupported public claims.

principles.title: Responsible operations
principles.text: Handle coffee preparation, storage and business communication in an organized and professional way.

principles.title: Long-term relationships
principles.text: Support dependable relationships with suppliers, buyers and trade partners through responsive follow-up.

principles.title: Verified information
principles.text: Publish certifications, measurements and performance statements only when they are documented and approved.
